channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Judge frees three illegal-immigrant murderers from detention; calls convictions 'irrelevant'
item.description: A federal judge ordered Homeland Security to release three illegal immigrants with homicide convictions on their criminal records and a fourth illegal...

item.title: Member of Trump's Religious Liberty Commission ousted in dispute over antisemitism
item.description: A member of the federal Religious Liberty Commission has been ousted after a hearing this week that featured tense exchanges on the definition of anti...

item.title: Ohio legislature calls on Congress to abolish the U.S. Department of Education
item.description: Ohio state lawmakers passed a joint resolution Wednesday calling on Congress to abolish the U.S. Department of Education.

item.title: Protesters in multiple states press Target to oppose the immigration crackdown in Minnesota
item.description: Activists planned protests at more than two dozen Target stores around the United States on Wednesday to pressure the discount retailer into taking a ...

item.title: Will the AI Revolution Foment a Revolution?
item.description: It’s quite possible that the apocalyptic economic warnings are overblown. But what do free marketeers do if the doomers are right?

item.title: Trump Busts Another Taboo
item.description: It used to be that U.S. presidents didn’t pop off on every Tom, Dick, and Harry.

item.title: Virginia’s Gerrymandering Vandalism
item.description: The Virginia gerrymander would create an extreme deep-blue House caucus in a purple state based upon winning one election cycle.

item.title: 213 Democrats Vote Against Requiring Voter ID And Proof Of Citizenship To Vote
item.description: Nearly every single Democrat voted against legislation that would require documentary proof of citizenship to register to vote and photo ID for voting...

item.title: A Congressman’s Five Questions for Munich
item.description: This week’s Munich Security Conference comes at a consequential moment for both U.S. security planning and the future of the Western alliance.

item.title: Senate backs compelling D.C. to adopt no tax on tips, overtime in initial vote
item.description: The Senate gave initial approval Wednesday to a bill forcing the District to adopt a series of tax cuts included in the One Big Beautiful Bill, from w...

item.title: High Fashion Wasn’t Easy in Imperial Spain
item.description: Fabrics, jewelry, and tailoring were tops, but the Hispanic Society shows us that looking good could be hazardous to your health.

item.title: Trans School Shooter In Canada Is Latest In Growing Epidemic Of Transgender Violence
item.description: A mentally ill man cosplaying as a woman reportedly shot and killed six people at a school in British Columbia after murdering his mother and stepbrot...

item.title: Bishops Call On Notre Dame To Rescind Pro-Abortion Professor’s Appointment To Leadership
item.description: The appointment is merely the latest attack on the Catholic identity of Notre Dame in recent years.

item.title: Docs Reveal LA Teachers Union Plot To Use Schools For ICE ‘Resistance’ With Whistles, Group Chats
item.description: The docs show the union attempting to create an anti-ICE surveillance state in schools, complete with patrols and Signal group chats.

item.title: Conservatives Can’t Beat Democrats Until They Defeat The RINOs In Their Own Party First
item.description: Until conservatives root out the rot within their own party, the D.C. status quo will continue to remain the same.
